summary: Tested 6-bug fix batch: logo upload + theme sync, PUT institution settings sync, program image upload (PRO_PLUS), unsupported file rejection, plan upgrade modal viewport fit, mobile FAB z-index, register skip-step-4, and booking page logo URL. Backend 19/19 PASS. Frontend 3/5 verified PASS, 2 inconclusive due to test-selector/route mismatches that need main-agent clarification.

integration_issues.issue: Navigating to /registrace redirects (200) to landing page / and renders no form inputs. Either the route was not added or the path is different than the task description claims. The 'register-skip-step4' testid could not be reached.

Inputs `program-preparation-time` / `program-cleanup-time` are not present in the visible Detail tab. Switching to the second tab via `button[role=tab]:has-text('Nastavení')` returned 0 matches — tab buttons likely use different role/markup. Needs main-agent verification of the correct testid/tab and a quick selector confirmation; functional behaviour (typing 0) could not be empirically verified by the test agent.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/settings/logo/upload PNG -> 200, logo_url returned, /api/institution/settings.logo_url synced, /api/settings/theme/public/{id}.logo_url synced
Backend: POST /api/programs/{id}/image/upload PNG on PRO_PLUS -> 200, image_url returned and persisted on program
Backend: Upload of .txt rejected with HTTP 400 (both logo and program image)
Backend: All 14 regression tests in test_logo_upload.py pass (JPG/SVG/WebP, size limit, public serve, 404, auth required, theme save)

Frontend: /admin/plan select-plan-start opens dialog at y=54 height=972 -> fits 1080 viewport (top & bottom within bounds); internal overflow:auto scrollHeight 985 > clientHeight 756; Cancel + Objednat buttons present; red 'Přijdete o' section present (green 'Získáte navíc' correctly absent for downgrade from PRO+ to Start)
Frontend: Mobile (390x800) /admin/programs FAB testid=create-program-button position:fixed z-index:50; elementFromPoint at center returns the button itself; click opens create-program modal
Frontend: /booking/{institution_id} BookingHeader img[data-testid=institution-logo-img].src is absolute https URL (resolveAssetUrl works), image loads (complete=true, naturalWidth>0)
action_items: Verify the public registration route - the task references /registrace but navigating to /registrace returns the landing page. Either add a router entry for /registrace or update the test plan with the actual URL.

Confirm/add data-testids `program-preparation-time` and `program-cleanup-time` for the Nastavení/Konfigurace tab inputs in ProgramsPage.js. The tab buttons may not be using role=tab — please ensure they are reachable by stable testids (e.g. data-testid=program-tab-settings).
Manual self-test recommended: in /admin/programs editor open Nastavení tab and verify '0' can be typed into preparation_time and cleanup_time and survives blur.
critical_code_review_comments: The new resolveAssetUrl helper in /app/frontend/src/config/api.js is verified working — booking page now serves absolute URLs.
Backend update_institution_settings sync to public theme works for both raw PUT body and after logo upload — good.
Consider adding the `register-skip-step4` testid only after confirming the /registrace route mounts the RegisterPage component.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (3/5 confirmed, 2 inconclusive due to selector/route issues)

seed_data_creation: Tests upload small 1x1 PNG/JPG/SVG/WebP fixtures as logos and program images. Last uploaded logo at /api/settings/logo/budezivo/logos/c18a10b9-.../c32d7342-...png is the current institution logo (1x1 px) and may need replacing with a real logo for visual QA.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are stable (19/19). Re-run requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported in env. For frontend: prep/cleanup inputs are in the Programs editor's Nastavení tab; the selector button[role=tab]:has-text('Nastavení') did not match — main agent should verify markup. /registrace route does not currently mount RegisterPage — confirm correct path before re-testing skip-step-4. Plan modal & mobile FAB & booking logo verified working.
rca of the issue: Two task items could not be verified: (1) /registrace returns the landing page rather than the RegisterPage — likely the route is registered under a different path (e.g. /registrovat, /vyzkouset-zdarma) or the SPA fallback isn't wired; reproduction: GET https://school-crm-pilot.preview.emergentagent.com/registrace -> 200 but rendered DOM has 0 inputs and same buttons as / landing. (2) Program editor's prep/cleanup-time fields are on a non-Detail tab; the test agent could not switch tabs because the implementation likely uses custom button elements (without role=tab) for the Detail/Nastavení/Kolize tabs. Mitigation: main agent to confirm route mounts and tab testids.
